englishDefinitions: Items commonly associated with Easter celebrations, especially chocolate rabbits and gift baskets.
A phrase referring to the sweet, decorative, and gift-giving side of Easter.
persianTranslation: نمادهای عید پاک مثل شکلات و سبد هدیه
شکلات‌های خرگوشی و سبدهای عید پاک
examples: The store was full of chocolate bunnies and baskets before Easter.
The children woke up early to look for chocolate bunnies and baskets.
For many families, Easter means eggs, chocolate bunnies and baskets.
